series_metadata.series_title: ABSTRACTS OF THE DUPLICATE OF GENERAL PERSONAL AND CLASSIFIED PROPERTY
series_metadata.series_description: Single Vol. Bound Co. Aud. Form N-16-a. Tax years 1962 to 1970, incl. office area. The uses and purposes are the same as the abstracts of real and utility property. Prior to tax year 1932, real, public utility and personal property of all classes was carried on the same tax list and one record prepared.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Current and preceeding year unbound. Next 10 preceeding years bound. Vols. for the tax year 1932 to 1961 to be placed in the custody of the Ohio Historical Society with the Dept. of Tax Equalization retaining ownership and provision made annually to retire to the Society the earliest volume in our file., Paper: Archives
